title: Cross-sectional feature pack: relative-to-peers ranks, dispersion, sector-relative signals
source: 2026-07-03 deep project review (alpha-readiness audit); gaps previously lived only in spec prose
why: Current equity pack is own-bar only (cs_spread_21) + macro. Nothing relative-to-peers: no cross-sectional momentum/vol ranks, no sector-relative returns, no universe dispersion. Equity alpha is largely relative; with own-bar + macro features the meta-model has little to discriminate on cross-sectionally. Spec OQ2 said add equity-specific features only if the loop is signal-starved — the B0003 first run is the test of that; this item is staged so it can start immediately if B0003 comes back signal-starved.
value_rationale: High if B0003 is signal-starved (likely per audit); the structural enabler of relative-value equity alpha.
scope: Cross-sectional z-scores/ranks of momentum, vol, and volume across the B0003 universe (point-in-time within panel, no lookahead)
Sector/universe-relative return features; universe dispersion features
Wire into build_tier2_features behind the asset-class pack mechanism; MDA importance check post-run
recommendation: PROMOTED TO SPEC 2026-07-03: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-03-b0006-cross-sectional-features.md (v1 pack: 6 rank features + 2 panel scalars; market-residualization; collider guard; pre-registered falsification criteria). Grounded in quant-phd-advisor consult (Blitz 2011, George-Hwang 2004, Gu-Kelly-Xiu 2020, LdP-Zoonekynd 2024).
out_of_scope: Earnings-surprise / analyst-revision alt-data (spec OQ2 second half) — separate item if still starved after this.

history.reason: signal-starved trigger fired (M3 NO EDGE readout); spec written

history.reason: Promoted to spec after M3 NO EDGE confirmed the signal-starved trigger. Advisor consult recommends 6 CS percentile-rank features (sector/market-residual momentum, 52wk-high, residual reversal, idio-vol, turnover, basket-beta) + dispersion & breadth panel scalars; cap justified by ~690 effective bets and 35-name panel width (Marcenko-Pastur). Key guards: no sector one-hots (collider bias), percentile ranks not z-scores, clustered MDA with F1. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-03-b0006-cross-sectional-features.md
Implementation plan written: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-03-pooled-audit-cross-section.md (pack Task 1, wiring Task 2, validation protocol + falsification evaluation Task 6)

B0006 CS-pack v1 validation READ (2026-07-03): pack FAILS pre-registered falsification (spec section 6). Runs: (a) clf_equity_m3_d1_cs state primaries, (b) clf_equity_m3_cusum_cs sparse cusum, vs no-CS baseline clf_equity_m3_d1. CRIT1 (no cluster signal) FIRES: pure-CS clustered-MDA mean +1.66e-4 (a)/+6.0e-5 (b), median ~1e-5 - same ~1e-4 band as the non-CS noise floor (7.4e-5/8.9e-5) and 2-3 orders below the technical/primary cluster (0.007-0.032); ONC re-clusters per fold so per-cluster bootstrap-CI-over-folds not cleanly derivable, spirit applied. CRIT2 (no skill uplift) FIRES: nanmedian ROC-AUC 0.5445 (a) vs 0.5452 baseline (delta -0.0007, ~1SE 0.0027); PR-AUC 0.2802 vs 0.2818; OOF-AUC 0.5312 vs 0.5297; stack passes 0/70 both = CS changed no decision. CRIT3 (survivorship) NOT COMPUTABLE this round (no sector-neutral re-run; features already rank-only by construction). CRIT4 (DSR collapse) NOT CLEANLY COMPUTABLE, consistent with collapse: PSR/DSR non-NaN only 10/280 (a), 0/280 baseline, 0/140 (b); where computable DSR ~0 after 112-trial deflation. Passing requires opposite of ALL four -> FAILS. Section-5 protocol: CS signal NOT larger under sparse cusum (pure-CS MDA lower, OOF-AUC 0.5219 lower, zero-trade 98.8% worse) -> directional hypothesis falsified. Cross-cutting: effective-N converges ~650-690 across dense-state (688.6/647.4), pooled-audit (~11.9k raw) and ungated-cusum (19,659 raw -> 654 eff, ~30x concurrency) vs 799 floor -> cross-asset wall-clock uniqueness methodology is the binding constraint (open question for quant-phd-advisor: is full cross-asset redundancy the right AFML section-4 generalization?). Readout: docs/superpowers/reports/2026-07-03-pooled-audit-b0006-readout.md. Status unchanged (human decision).
